subject: Public Health
title: Adverse Childhood Experiences
description: A quick, practical guide to Adverse Childhood Experiences.

hook.text: The ACE study revealed that childhood trauma predicts adult disease decades later—even heart attacks and cancer.

buildup.text: ACEs include abuse, neglect, and household dysfunction—each one increases health risks cumulatively.

discovery.text: A person with 4+ ACEs has a 12-fold increase in suicide risk and 7-fold increase in alcoholism risk.

twist.text: ACEs are staggeringly common—about 61% of adults report at least one, and 16% report four or more.

climax.text: Trauma-informed care—asking 'what happened to you' instead of 'what's wrong with you'—changes outcomes.

punchline.text: Childhood wounds shape adult health. Healing them changes everything.

quiz.question: What does a person with 4+ ACEs have a 12-fold increase in?
